trans-unit.source: Navigate the active tracked browser page back in its history.
trans-unit.target: Navigate the active tracked browser page back in its history.

trans-unit.source: Return the current URL, title, and ready state for the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Return the current URL, title, and ready state for the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.
trans-unit.target: Capture a screenshot from the active tracked browser session and save it as a PNG artifact.

trans-unit.source: Send a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command to the active tracked browser page or browser connection.
trans-unit.target: Send a raw Chrome DevTools Protocol command to the active tracked browser page or browser connection.

trans-unit.source: Chrome DevTools Protocol method name, such as Runtime.evaluate or Target.getTargets.
trans-unit.target: Chrome DevTools Protocol method name, such as Runtime.evaluate or Target.getTargets.

trans-unit.source: Optional JSON object for the CDP command parameters.
trans-unit.target: Optional JSON object for the CDP command parameters.

trans-unit.source: Send the command to the attached page session or the browser-level connection.
trans-unit.target: Send the command to the attached page session or the browser-level connection.

trans-unit.source: Check a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Check a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Clear existing cookies and storage before restoring state.
trans-unit.target: Clear existing cookies and storage before restoring state.

trans-unit.source: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.
trans-unit.target: Close the active tracked browser page for this resource.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

trans-unit.source: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.
trans-unit.target: Choose an installed Chromium-based browser or enter an executable path.

trans-unit.source: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.
trans-unit.target: Choose the browser, profile, user data mode, and scope used by tracked browser sessions.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings cannot be configured because dashboard interactions are not available.

trans-unit.source: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.
trans-unit.target: Choose a Chromium profile from the Aspire-managed browser hive, or enter a profile directory/name.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the Chromium profile directory name, {1} is the Chromium profile display name

trans-unit.source: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.
trans-unit.target: Profiles can only be selected when user data mode is Shared.

trans-unit.source: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global Browser Automation settings.
trans-unit.target: Choose tracked browser settings. Resource-specific settings override global Browser Automation settings.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings could not be saved to user secrets for key '{0}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the user secrets configuration key

trans-unit.source: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.
trans-unit.target: Save these settings to [user secrets](https://aka.ms/aspire/user-secrets) so future AppHost runs use them.

trans-unit.source: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.
trans-unit.target: User secrets are not configured for this AppHost, so settings can only apply to this running AppHost.

trans-unit.note: {0} is the resource name or scope that the settings apply to

trans-unit.source: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.
trans-unit.target: User data mode must be Shared or Isolated.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser settings cannot be saved because the AppHost does not have user secrets configured.

trans-unit.source: Optional cookie domain used when setting or clearing a cookie.
trans-unit.target: Optional cookie domain used when setting or clearing a cookie.

trans-unit.source: Optional cookie name. Required when setting a cookie.
trans-unit.target: Optional cookie name. Required when setting a cookie.

trans-unit.source: Optional cookie path used when setting or clearing a cookie. Defaults to /.
trans-unit.target: Optional cookie path used when setting or clearing a cookie. Defaults to /.

trans-unit.source: Cookie value to set. Empty text clears the cookie value.
trans-unit.target: Cookie value to set. Empty text clears the cookie value.

trans-unit.source: Cookie action to perform: get, set, or clear.
trans-unit.target: Cookie action to perform: get, set, or clear.

trans-unit.source: Get, set, or clear cookies visible to the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Get, set, or clear cookies visible to the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Horizontal scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll right and negative values scroll left.
trans-unit.target: Horizontal scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll right and negative values scroll left.

trans-unit.source: Vertical scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll down and negative values scroll up.
trans-unit.target: Vertical scroll distance in CSS pixels. Positive values scroll down and negative values scroll up.

trans-unit.source: Dialog action to perform: accept or dismiss.
trans-unit.target: Dialog action to perform: accept or dismiss.

trans-unit.source: Accept or dismiss the currently open JavaScript dialog in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Accept or dismiss the currently open JavaScript dialog in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Double-click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Double-click an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Browser download behavior: allow, allowAndName, deny, or default.
trans-unit.target: Browser download behavior: allow, allowAndName, deny, or default.

trans-unit.source: Enable browser download progress events when supported by the browser.
trans-unit.target: Enable browser download progress events when supported by the browser.

trans-unit.source: Directory path for downloaded files. Required for allow and allowAndName behavior.
trans-unit.target: Directory path for downloaded files. Required for allow and allowAndName behavior.

trans-unit.source: Configure download behavior for the tracked browser.
trans-unit.target: Configure download behavior for the tracked browser.

trans-unit.source: Element state to wait for: attached, detached, visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.
trans-unit.target: Element state to wait for: attached, detached, visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

trans-unit.source: Evaluate a JavaScript expression in the active tracked browser page and return the JSON-serializable result.
trans-unit.target: Evaluate a JavaScript expression in the active tracked browser page and return the JSON-serializable result.

trans-unit.source: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate in the browser page.
trans-unit.target: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate in the browser page.

trans-unit.source: File path to upload, or a JSON array of file paths for multiple files.
trans-unit.target: File path to upload, or a JSON array of file paths for multiple files.

trans-unit.source: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Fill an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Find a browser element by role, text, label, placeholder, alt text, title, test ID, or selector position and return its snapshot details.
trans-unit.target: Find a browser element by role, text, label, placeholder, alt text, title, test ID, or selector position and return its snapshot details.

trans-unit.source: Search text, role, test ID, or CSS selector depending on the find strategy.
trans-unit.target: Search text, role, test ID, or CSS selector depending on the find strategy.

trans-unit.source: Focus an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Focus an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: Navigate the active tracked browser page forward in its history.
trans-unit.target: Navigate the active tracked browser page forward in its history.

trans-unit.source: List frame elements in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: List frame elements in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Capture beyond the current viewport when supported by the browser.
trans-unit.target: Capture beyond the current viewport when supported by the browser.

trans-unit.source: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate until it returns a truthy value.
trans-unit.target: JavaScript expression or zero-argument function to evaluate until it returns a truthy value.

trans-unit.source: Return a structured value from the active tracked browser page, such as title, URL, text, HTML, field value, attribute, count, box, or styles.
trans-unit.target: Return a structured value from the active tracked browser page, such as title, URL, text, HTML, field value, attribute, count, box, or styles.

trans-unit.source: Highlight an element in the active tracked browser page for visual debugging.
trans-unit.target: Highlight an element in the active tracked browser page for visual debugging.

trans-unit.source: Move the pointer over an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.
trans-unit.target: Move the pointer over an element in the active tracked browser page using a CSS selector.

trans-unit.source: One-based element index used by nth find strategy.
trans-unit.target: One-based element index used by nth find strategy.

trans-unit.source: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.
trans-unit.target: Return a JSON snapshot of the active tracked browser page, including URL, title, visible text, and actionable elements with selectors.

trans-unit.source: Check whether a selected browser element is visible, enabled, or checked.
trans-unit.target: Check whether a selected browser element is visible, enabled, or checked.

trans-unit.source: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.
trans-unit.target: Keyboard key to press, such as Enter, Escape, Tab, or a single character.

trans-unit.source: Dispatch a keydown event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Dispatch a keydown event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Dispatch a keyup event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Dispatch a keyup event on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Find strategy: role, text, label, placeholder, alt, title, testid, first, last, or nth.
trans-unit.target: Find strategy: role, text, label, placeholder, alt, title, testid, first, last, or nth.

trans-unit.source: Page load state to wait for: domcontentloaded, load, complete, or networkidle.
trans-unit.target: Page load state to wait for: domcontentloaded, load, complete, or networkidle.

trans-unit.source: How the current browser URL should be compared with the URL argument.
trans-unit.target: How the current browser URL should be compared with the URL argument.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of actionable elements to include in the page snapshot.

trans-unit.source: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.
trans-unit.target: Maximum number of visible page text characters to include in the page snapshot.

trans-unit.source: Mouse action to dispatch: move, down, up, click, or wheel.
trans-unit.target: Mouse action to dispatch: move, down, up, click, or wheel.

trans-unit.source: Dispatch low-level mouse input at viewport coordinates in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Dispatch low-level mouse input at viewport coordinates in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Mouse button for down, up, and click actions.
trans-unit.target: Mouse button for down, up, and click actions.

trans-unit.source: Optional attribute name, CSS property name, accessible name, or other command-specific qualifier.
trans-unit.target: Optional attribute name, CSS property name, accessible name, or other command-specific qualifier.

trans-unit.source: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.
trans-unit.target: Navigate the active tracked browser page to an absolute URL.

trans-unit.source: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser diagnostics to this resource.
trans-unit.target: Open the app in a tracked browser session and stream browser diagnostics to this resource.

trans-unit.source: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Press a key on a selected or currently focused element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Optional text to enter before accepting a prompt dialog.
trans-unit.target: Optional text to enter before accepting a prompt dialog.

trans-unit.source: Browser value to read: title, url, text, html, value, attr, count, box, or styles.
trans-unit.target: Browser value to read: title, url, text, html, value, attr, count, box, or styles.

trans-unit.source: Reload the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Reload the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Image format for the screenshot: png, jpeg, or webp.
trans-unit.target: Image format for the screenshot: png, jpeg, or webp.

trans-unit.source: Optional image quality from 0 to 100 for jpeg or webp screenshots.
trans-unit.target: Optional image quality from 0 to 100 for jpeg or webp screenshots.

trans-unit.source: Scroll the active tracked browser page or a selected scrollable element.
trans-unit.target: Scroll the active tracked browser page or a selected scrollable element.

trans-unit.source: Scroll an element in the active tracked browser page into view.
trans-unit.target: Scroll an element in the active tracked browser page into view.

trans-unit.source: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.
trans-unit.target: Select an option in a browser select element by option value or visible text.

trans-unit.source: Option value or visible option text to select.
trans-unit.target: Option value or visible option text to select.

trans-unit.source: CSS selector or snapshot ref for the target element. Use refs such as e1 returned by Inspect browser page when possible.
trans-unit.target: CSS selector or snapshot ref for the target element. Use refs such as e1 returned by Inspect browser page when possible.

trans-unit.source: Return a fresh browser page snapshot with the action result for immediate verification.
trans-unit.target: Return a fresh browser page snapshot with the action result for immediate verification.

trans-unit.source: Browser state action to perform: get, set, or clear.
trans-unit.target: Browser state action to perform: get, set, or clear.

trans-unit.source: Element state to check: visible, enabled, or checked.
trans-unit.target: Element state to check: visible, enabled, or checked.

trans-unit.source: Get, restore, or clear browser page state including cookies, localStorage, and sessionStorage.
trans-unit.target: Get, restore, or clear browser page state including cookies, localStorage, and sessionStorage.

trans-unit.source: Browser state JSON returned by the get action. Required when setting browser state.
trans-unit.target: Browser state JSON returned by the get action. Required when setting browser state.

trans-unit.source: Storage action to perform: get, set, or clear.
trans-unit.target: Storage action to perform: get, set, or clear.

trans-unit.source: Browser storage area: local or session.
trans-unit.target: Browser storage area: local or session.

trans-unit.source: Get, set, or clear localStorage or sessionStorage entries for the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Get, set, or clear localStorage or sessionStorage entries for the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Optional storage key. Required when setting a storage value.
trans-unit.target: Optional storage key. Required when setting a storage value.

trans-unit.source: Storage value to set. Empty text stores an empty string.
trans-unit.target: Storage value to set. Empty text stores an empty string.

trans-unit.source: Absolute URL for a new tab. Required when opening a tab.
trans-unit.target: Absolute URL for a new tab. Required when opening a tab.

trans-unit.source: Tab action to perform: list, open, or close.
trans-unit.target: Tab action to perform: list, open, or close.

trans-unit.source: List, open, or close browser page targets in the tracked browser.
trans-unit.target: List, open, or close browser page targets in the tracked browser.

trans-unit.source: Browser target ID. Required when closing a tab.
trans-unit.target: Browser target ID. Required when closing a tab.

trans-unit.source: Visible page text to wait for.
trans-unit.target: Visible page text to wait for.

trans-unit.source: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.
trans-unit.target: Maximum time to wait before the browser command fails.

trans-unit.source: Type text into an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Type text into an input, textarea, or editable element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Text to type into the target element.
trans-unit.target: Text to type into the target element.

trans-unit.source: Uncheck a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Uncheck a checkbox or other checkable element in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: Attach one or more local files to a file input in the active tracked browser page.
trans-unit.target: Attach one or more local files to a file input in the active tracked browser page.

trans-unit.source: URL fragment to wait for in the active browser page.
trans-unit.target: URL fragment to wait for in the active browser page.

trans-unit.source: Text value to assign to the target field.
trans-unit.target: Text value to assign to the target field.

trans-unit.source: Wait until a browser condition is met. Supports selectors, text, URL matches, load states, element states, and JavaScript predicates.
trans-unit.target: Wait until a browser condition is met. Supports selectors, text, URL matches, load states, element states, and JavaScript predicates.

trans-unit.source: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.
trans-unit.target: Wait until a selector is visible, text appears on the page, or both conditions are met.

trans-unit.source: Wait until a selected element reaches a state such as visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.
trans-unit.target: Wait until a selected element reaches a state such as visible, hidden, enabled, disabled, checked, or unchecked.

trans-unit.source: Browser element state wait condition was met.
trans-unit.target: Browser element state wait condition was met.

trans-unit.source: Wait until the active tracked browser page reaches a load state.
trans-unit.target: Wait until the active tracked browser page reaches a load state.

trans-unit.source: Browser load state wait condition was met.
trans-unit.target: Browser load state wait condition was met.

trans-unit.source: Wait until the active tracked browser page URL matches the expected value.
trans-unit.target: Wait until the active tracked browser page URL matches the expected value.

trans-unit.source: Browser URL wait condition was met.
trans-unit.target: Browser URL wait condition was met.

trans-unit.source: URL value to wait for. It can be a full URL, URL fragment, or regular expression depending on the match mode.
trans-unit.target: URL value to wait for. It can be a full URL, URL fragment, or regular expression depending on the match mode.

trans-unit.source: Viewport X coordinate in CSS pixels.
trans-unit.target: Viewport X coordinate in CSS pixels.

trans-unit.source: Viewport Y coordinate in CSS pixels.
trans-unit.target: Viewport Y coordinate in CSS pixels.
